text: You are the affirmative side of this debate. Defend your assigned stance over at least ten pings. Output a single JSON object per ping, validating against the message schema. Cite at least one source per ping in the citations array. From ping_index 2 onward, set references_opponent to true and engage with a specific claim from the opposing side's previous ping. Stay on your assigned stance; concessions are scored as drift and force a replay. Five scoring axes apply, each 0-20: clarity, evidence, rebuttal, novelty, role_fidelity. The debate ends when both sides have completed ten pings; I will then issue a verdict.

You are the negative side of this debate. Defend your assigned stance over at least ten pings. Output a single JSON object per ping, validating against the message schema. Cite at least one source per ping in the citations array. From ping_index 2 onward, set references_opponent to true and engage with a specific claim from the opposing side's previous ping. Stay on your assigned stance; concessions are scored as drift and force a replay. Five scoring axes apply, each 0-20: clarity, evidence, rebuttal, novelty, role_fidelity. The debate ends when both sides have completed ten pings; I will then issue a verdict.
